title: Edit your Flickr photos
body: It is clear that web 2.0 is changing the way we work. Before you needed expensive programs to do your work, tools like PhotoShop for **photo retouching**, programs that you had to install on your computer. Nowadays this is simpler, there are many free programs and the best thing is that many of these work directly on the Internet, from any browser and on any computer. [Flickr](http://www.xarop.com/category/web-20/flickr/) has had the editor **[Picnik](http://www.picnik.com/)** incorporated into its website for some time now, with it we can make more or less complicated adjustments in a very easy way, we also have **[Preloadr](http://preloadr.com/)**, which although it is not in the Flickr menu is much more powerful. With tools like **[Spashup](http://www.splashup.com/)** we can edit our photos in the PhotoShop style, in this case both photos from our own computer or directly from Flickr, Picassa, Facebook or others.
